visual_summary: A colorful animated Confetti effect that appears when the user hovers over it. Suitable for celebratory or festive UI elements. This demo showcases the Confetti component from Magic UI with customizable animations and styles.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: Confetti Demo
Description: A colorful animated Confetti effect that appears when the user hovers over it. Suitable for celebratory or festive UI elements. This demo showcases the Confetti component from Magic UI with customizable animations and styles.
Style: colorful, animated
Interactions: hover, animated
Tags: magicui, confetti, animation, ui-element

- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
